data.title: Major banks like Bank of America, Citi, and Goldman Sachs are reportedly exploring a joint stablecoin.
data.description: Major financial institutions such as Bank of American, Goldman Sachs, and Citi are reportedly considering the issuance of a stablecoin, as revealed in an announcement on Friday.

data.title: TrustCo Bank Corp NY to release Q3 results on Oct 21, 2025, with a conference call on Oct 22, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Participants can dial 1-833-470-1428 (US) or 1-833-950-0062 (Canada) for the call, access code 142665, with a replay available for 30 days by dialing 1-866-813-9403, access code 156241.
data.description: GLENVILLE, NY, 10/10/2025 - TrustCo Bank Corp NY (TrustCo, Nasdaq: TRST) disclosed that their Q3 2025 results will be made public after market close on Oct 21, 2025. Results are shared on the 21 st of reporting months (Jan, Apr, Jul, and Oct), or the next market day if the 21st falls on a Fri, weekend, or holiday. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET on Oct 22, 2025. Interested participants can join by dialing toll-free for the US at 1-833-470-1428, and for Canada at 1-833-950-0062, Access code 142665. A replay will be accessible for thirty days by dialing toll-free for the US at 1-866-813-9403, Access code 156241.

data.title: Bitcoin hits $126K, Strategy's BTC holdings rise. ICE supports Polymarket, Rezolve AI acquires Smartpay, Plume becomes SEC transfer agent.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has surged to over $126,000 as Strategy's holdings of BTC grow. In other news, ICE has announced its support for Polymarket, while Rezolve AI has acquired Smartpay. Additionally, Plume has been granted transfer-agent status by the SEC.

data.title: Apogee Therapeutics closes offering, raises $345M with 8,048,782 shares at $41/share and 365,853 pre-funded warrants.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Apogee Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: APGE) based in San Francisco and Boston, completed an underwritten public offering of its common stock. This offering included 8,048,782 shares of common stock, with an additional 1,097,561 shares sold due to the underwriters exercising their option in full. The public offering price per share was $41.00. Additionally, certain investors received pre-funded warrants to purchase up to 365,853 shares at a price of $40.99999 per warrant with an exercise price of $0.00001 per share. The total gross proceeds generated from the offering amounted to around $345 million for Apogee, prior to deductions for underwriting discounts, commissions, and other related expenses.

data.title: Hingham Savings (NASDAQ: HIFS) reports Q3 2025 results in Hingham, Mass., as of September 30, 2025.
data.description: The Hingham Institution for Savings, located in Hingham, Massachusetts, revealed their financial performance for the quarter ending on September 30, 2025. The institution operates under the NASDAQ symbol HIFS.

data.title: Kikoff and Caribou partner to expand credit and auto refinancing options for millions of consumers.
data.description: In San Francisco, Kikoff and Caribou have joined forces to increase credit and auto refinancing options for a vast consumer base. This strategic partnership aims to benefit millions of individuals seeking improved financial solutions.

data.title: Texas legislator pushing state’s crypto reserve bill hints at Ether's possible inclusion after drop halts progress toward compliance.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ranking second by market capitalization was close to complying with the criteria outlined in Texas' crypto reserve legislation until a decline in price on Friday.

data.title: Over $1B in crypto liquidations as Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana erase gains amid Trump's tariffs, in October downtrend.
data.description: In a surprising turn of events for the cryptocurrency market dubbed as "Uptober," Bitcoin experienced a significant plunge alongside Ethereum and Solana on Friday. This drop led to Ethereum and Solana reaching their lowest numbers for the month of October. The downfall was attributed to President Trump's introduction of new tariffs.

data.title: BTC drops below $116K; analysts stay optimistic for solid buying at lower levels. Price predictions for top coins shared.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin has dropped under $116,000, prompting concern among investors. However, some analysts are not worried and predict a surge in buying activity at lower prices.

data.title: WiSA launches low-cost transmitter, mobile app, and interoperability process for audio devices, targeting soundbar and TV markets.
data.description: Cutting-edge WiSA solutions are now available for soundbars, home theaters, home speakers, and TVs, catering to the high demand for top-tier sound quality and immersive multichannel audio experiences. These new WiSA offerings are engineered to streamline product development processes, reduce costs, and accelerate time-to-market for businesses operating in these booming industries. This innovation comes as a significant boost for companies seeking a competitive edge in the market, promising enhanced performance and efficiency.

data.title: Dickey’s Barbecue Pit showcases strength with over 400 locations in 2025, bouncing back despite industry challenges.
data.description: In Dallas, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit is defying the trend of restaurant closures and economic difficulties. While other national franchise restaurant chains are shrinking in size, Dickey’s Barbecue has demonstrated resilience by achieving net restaurant unit growth in 2025, now boasting over 400 locations. By focusing on profitability and quality, the brand has made strategic decisions to close underperforming or problematic locations and has successfully rebounded from challenges in the market.

data.title: CORRECTION: Life & Banc Split Corp. to split Class A shares and raise total distributions in a recent announcement.
data.description: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the unemployment rate in the country has surged to 7.9%, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. The number of job losses was reported to be over 1.5 million, impacting various sectors of the economy. Additionally, it was revealed that the youth unemployment rate has reached 15.3%, posing a grave concern for the future workforce. The government has announced plans to implement measures to address this issue and stimulate job growth in the coming months. Overall, the current economic situation remains challenging, with efforts being made to combat the rising unemployment rate and its adverse effects on the population.

data.title: Brompton Split Banc Corp. announces Class A share split and total distribution increase.
data.description: A recent report stated that the global green energy market is projected to grow by 8.3% annually, reaching a value of $1.5 trillion by the year 2030. This growth is driven by increasing environmental concerns, government initiatives promoting renewable energy, and advancements in technology making green energy more cost-effective. Solar power is expected to dominate the market, with wind and hydropower also playing significant roles in the transition towards sustainable energy. The report also highlighted the rising investment in green energy projects, with over $300 billion already committed by various stakeholders. The push towards a greener energy landscape is seen as vital in combating climate change and reducing dependence on fossil fuels.
